Our Inventory

Materials curated
for endurance.

HDMR Boards

High-Density Moisture Resistant panels made by compressing fine wood fibers under extreme pressure. Highly recommended for wet zones, modular kitchens, and vanities.

Key Features
  • Absolute water resistance
  • High screw holding capacity
  • Termite & borer proof
  • 100% flat surface

Stocked Sourcing Brands

Century Prowud
Premium high-density boards with official warranty certifications.
Action TESA HDMR
Market leader in moisture-resistant green panels.
Novopan Panels
Engineered wood sheets for structural modular cores.
Saptam Boards
Solid engineered wood sheets for heavy-duty interiors.

Need a custom sizing or batch price quote?

We offer special commercial trade discounts for local Rishikesh projects.

JagdambaTIMBER WORKS & PLYWOOD

Providing premium lumber, plywood, laminates, and custom cabinetry since 2006. Devoted to master craftsmanship, structural durability, and design heritage.
